category_sources: Official homepage describes ISPC as an open-source compiler for high-performance SIMD programming on CPU and GPU.
source_facts.description says it is a compiler for SIMD programming on the CPU.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading is Intel ISPC and expands to Intel Implicit SPMD Program Compiler.
docs_sources: Official documentation page lists getting started material, user guides, examples, performance guide, and FAQ.
Official homepage links to the GitHub documentation wiki.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ispc/ispc; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes the C-based SPMD language, SIMD targets, LLVM backend, and performance focus.
source_facts.description identifies a SIMD programming compiler.
